nodes.context: Camorra clan from Quartieri Spagnoli, Naples, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and illegal lotteries.
Camorra clan that controlled Quartieri Spagnoli before Clan Mariano, allied with Di Biasi and Russo.
Camorra clan allied with Cutoliani and Russo, later at war with Clan Mariano.
Camorra clan allied with Cutoliani and Di Biasi, later declined.
Camorra alliance that fought Clan Mariano for control of Quartieri Spagnoli in the early 1990s.
Splinter group from Clan Mariano, involved in internal feud and killings.
Camorra clan associated with Michele Zaza, linked to Clan Mariano through Emilio Tancredi.
Camorra clan allied with Marco Mariano after his release.
Camorra clan from Cavone area, allied with Marco Mariano.
Camorra clan from Pallonetto di Santa Lucia, allied with Marco Mariano.
Camorra clan from Quartieri Spagnoli, historically affiliated with Picuozzi.
Camorra clan led by Enrico Ricci, emerged after decline of Di Biasi and Russo, allied with Sarno.
Camorra clan from Ponticelli, allied with Ricci.

edges.context: Clan Mariano rose after the decline of the Cutoliani, who previously controlled the area.
Clan Mariano was at war with the Di Biasi (Faiano) for control of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Clan Mariano fought the Alleanza di Secondigliano in the early 1990s.
Cardillo-Ranieri were scissionists from Clan Mariano, leading to a violent internal feud.
Emilio Tancredi, affiliated with Clan Zaza, was linked to Ciro Mariano in business dealings.
Marco Mariano allied with the Esposito clan after his release.
Marco Mariano allied with the Lepre clan from Cavone.
Marco Mariano allied with the Elia clan from Pallonetto di Santa Lucia.
Salvatore Terracciano's clan, historically affiliated with Picuozzi, joined the alliance with Marco Mariano.
The Ricci clan is allied with the Sarno clan from Ponticelli.
The Ricci-Sarno alliance opposed Marco Mariano's attempts to regain control of Quartieri Spagnoli.
